author: zsviczian
description: An interactive, structured mind-map of your Obsidian vault.

manifest.author: Zsolt Viczian
manifest.description: A clean, intuitive and editable graph view for Obsidian
manifest.name: ExcaliBrain

name: ExcaliBrain

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# Fixed
- Processing date values in document properties triggered an error
- The new popout settings window in Obsidian 1.13.0 can lead to ExcaliBrain settings file becoming corrupted if the user does not close the settings window before closing Obsidian.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.2.18

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
- Fixed the long-standing issue of pointerMove getting attached to the wrong window when opening ExcaliBrain in a pop-out window.
- Added RU translation 🙏 @tovBender
- Updated setting for index update interval to allow val ues up to 10 minutes.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.2.17

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description: Minor fix to address malformed URI issue in Excalibrain Indexing
releases.name: Excalibrain 0.2.16

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
The `DvAPIInterface` changed with the latest Dataview (0.5.65) release. The `obsidian-dataview/lib/typings/api` is not published.
Consequently, ExcaliBrain does not start up.
This update fixes the issue on the Excalidraw side.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# Fixed
- Creating a new Excalidraw drawing from the graph will now open a new Excalidraw tab on the main workspace
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.2.14

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
Clicking the URL link when it is the central node did not open the URL. Now it is fixed.
Note, the issue with new file creation [#201](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/issues/201) will be resolved with the next Excalidraw update.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.2.13

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
- Fixed crash due to duration fields
- Support for date properties in YAML
- Added "Hidden" ontology. Add fields here you don't want to show on the graph.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.2.12

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
This release includes a single fix with the Note Style tag that caused ExcaliBrain to crash in certain cases.
For more info: https://discord.com/channels/1026825302900494357/1168223653557702718
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.2.11

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New
Note type:: field and a setting to display multiple tag type prefixes.
See this video for more insight: 
[![Thumbnail - 20231008 Visual Zettelkasten (Custom)](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/assets/14358394/bfd594a2-a6cc-46c1-8436-d61d3394eb53)](https://youtu.be/uoNHkCLsp3g)

![image](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/assets/14358394/9d00e729-a1b2-4527-8727-2bba4070c852)
releases.name: Excalibrain 0.2.10

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New
- Keyword highlighting in the search

# Fixed
- Developer Console errors when Obsidian files are deleted during indexing (typically happens due to Obsidian Sync or equivalent service)
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.2.9

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
Improvements and bug fixes of the new layout engine. There is a new "Minimum Center-Friend Distance" setting.
I fixed the "refresh button" that was not working.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.2.8

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description: ![image](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/assets/14358394/c2b4c91a-0bfe-45e1-a4c7-a88365ab7683) # New - I added an option to invert arrow directions. I also updated the logic of TO and FROM when interpreting links and backlinks. If you liked the old way, set the "inverse arrow direction" in plugin settings under the Ontology section. ![image](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/assets/14358394/440c595f-007f-47ee-b62b-f61e20fc02a1) - Added navigation buttons, you can now Navigate back and forward in navigation history, and force refresh (reindex) the current page, should it not update in time (e.g. you have a slower refresh rate to avoid slowdown of Obsidian). - I added a separate button to control synchronization with workspace navigation. You can link the synchronization button to the embed button in plugin settings. ![image](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/assets/14358394/2f50426f-28ec-4f00-9f15-e6b1761b48df) - New dynamically compact view by @CarlB01 ![image](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/assets/14358394/072c1f26-6dff-4ddf-8e00-8f4501410e7a) # Fixed - creating a new page by shift+clicking on a virtual note did not work after the user has once opened the command palette - in embedded mode, changing the display of siblings, or display of aliases, etc. loaded the central node in the attached workspace leaf - opening a new drawing in the ExcaliBrain window, the toolbar and history were not removed - if the Excalidraw file is not compressed, and ExcaliBrain gets saved with URLs displayed while editing a node in the center, the alias was not recognized - The `Infer all implicit relationships as Friend` setting did not handle new relationships such as Right-Side Friends, Previous Friends, and Next Friends (#146)
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.2.7

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description: # New - Created a new modal window to add dataview fields to the ontology. - Added Editor right-click menu item "Add <> to ExcaliBrain Ontology" - Added new Command Palette action "Add dataview field to ontology: Open Ontology Modal" - The Ontology Command Palette actions now properly handle inline fields (such as:: this). You can invoke the add ontology modal window and it will recognize "such as" in this sentence. - Additionally, if you have (**such as**: value), i.e. a bold field name for easier visual recognition, the ontology will add "such as", without the markup # Fixed - @ in URL is not indexed correctly (#133) - Made minor adjustments to the layout
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.2.6

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New
- Minor improvement, when editing text in an embedded frame, the page will not autozoom when refreshing links around the central node
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.2.5

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
[![Thumbnail - 20230730 ExcaliBrain URL Indexing](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/assets/14358394/445ff066-1171-4cc5-a600-0f0ddfb84ceb)](https://youtu.be/3TRymEIQgPI)

# New
- Added Vault URL indexing
- Added Maximum Zoom Level to settings. The default value is 100%.

# Fixed
- Top right corner link for the central node in embedded mode was a relative link. As a consequence, Obsidian was not able to open the file when clicking in the top right corner of the central embed.
- History and Toolbar icons were behind the embedded iframe when panning the brain view.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.2.4

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New
- Cosmetic change: Following a recommendation from @TfTHacker I changed button icons from emojis to Obsidian style lucide.dev icons. 
- I also slightly reshuffled the sequence of icons. I think the order of buttons makes more sense now.
- I changed the styling of buttons to match Excalidraw styling.

# Fixed
- Splash screen flashing up on page render
- Processing logic for Previous and Next links. Link counts were wrong
- Processing logic for conflicting ontology (e.g. a node is defined on one ontology as a parent and on another as a child). Now all these conflicting relationships will be shown as inferred left-side friend relationships.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.2.3

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description: Fixes (hopefully) the flash between navigations.
releases.name: Excalidraw 0.2.2

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# Fixed
- ExcaliBrain losing focus on navigation, when in a popout window
- Fixed link click when in embedded mode. You can now click the link in the top right corner of the embedded item to open the item in a new tab to edit its contents.
- ExcaliBrain normal did not start a second start in certain conditions.

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
Big new feature: Embedded frames

[![Thumbnail - 20230717 ExcaliBrain Embedded Nodes (Custom)](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/assets/14358394/998dabfc-e01b-4a68-aed6-adec9d70a738)](https://youtu.be/_wldRlxTAxs)

- Improved work pane handling (ExcaliBrain should open in the right place, stay on top when needed, etc.)
- Improved navigation history and plugin settings saving. There were cases when the plugin lost ontology settings, hopefully, now that is resolved 🤞
- Chinese, Spanish, and German translation using Chat GPT 3.5


This is an early release, will surely have many bugs, that I will resolve over the coming weeks.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.2.0

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# Fixed
- If a page had the same dataview field, but in one case there was a single link after the field, and in the other a list of links one of the two (either the single link or the list of links) did not get indexed.
- Some virtual (ghost) links were not indexed
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.1.15

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
Introduction of right-side friends, previous and next friends.
ExcaliBrain now supports all four directions.
Previous friend relationships will be imported as "left-side friends"
The difference between left and right-side friends vs. previous and next friends is that left and right-side friends define a fixed left or righthand-side position, while previous and next act more similar to parent and child relationships which are directed. As you move from note to note what was previously "previous" becomes next... 
I suggest watching this video to get a better sense of the changes:

[![Thumbnail - 20230604 Idea Compass (Custom)](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/assets/14358394/5311ec5d-1901-4bdc-aa4a-a94e282deaf8)](https://youtu.be/7rnsULzez-g)
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.1.14

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
## New
- New Setting: `Default Popout 'Always on Top' Behavior` (at the end of the `Display` options right under `Autozoom`. If turned on, then when opening ExcaliBrain in a popout window via the Obsidian Command Palette, the new ExcaliBrain window will open with the window always on top... this means that you need to minimize the window to see what is happening under it. When navigating ExcaliBrain it will not always disappear behind the page you've opened.

# Fixed
- Gates on Friend nodes were detached from the node.
- If the note alias contained a colon e.g. (`Book: whatever`) the node title in ExcaliBrain read `[object, object]`.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.1.13

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
## New:
- Support for Obsidian 1.2.1 bookmarks
- Compact view as per description [#113](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/issues/113)
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/14358394/229353780-e1936880-6a99-4706-b37f-d64dfac9a3d6.png)


## Fixed:
- Minor styling issue with zoom buttons rendering over the click history
- The search box in the top left will render folders and tags using the style from Plugin Settings.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/14358394/229353750-f1ddde3c-784f-4225-b828-025fd8fb9b5a.png)
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.1.12

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New
- Added setting to disable AutoZoom #88
- Added setting to disable Autofocus on search when opening ExcaliBrain #87
Both new settings are at the bottom of the "Display" section in settings, right above the "Styling" section.

# Fixed
- When started, ExcaliBrain will open showing the file that was open last before invoking ExcaliBrain
- When navigating ExcaliBrain it will reuse the leaf showing the document active in ExcaliBrain instead of opening a new leaf or reusing a (seemingly) random leaf.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.1.11

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description: Fixes impact of breaking change in Dataview 0.5.42 (#86)
releases.name: Excalibrain 0.1.10

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description: Downgrading to React 17 due to stability issues.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.1.9

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description: I implemented some improvements to the layout. The graph uses 1,2,3,4 and 5 columns to display information in a more adaptive and intelligent manner. I also reduced the distance between parents and siblings, so the graph looks slightly more compact.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.1.8

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description: Fixing Obsidian 0.16.0 compatibility issues
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.1.7

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# Fixed:
- Links that included a block reference did not get processed as part of the ontology (#79).
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.1.6

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New feature
- I added a plugin setting option to reverse the logic for interpreting links and backlinks. If reverse logic is used backlinks become children and links become parents unless otherwise defined by your ontology. (#78)
- I added a plugin setting to change the time interval of the index-update timer. By increasing the interval you can reduce the overhead on your system. I also added a new feature to update the index whenever you switch work panes, in case a file has changed in your Vault since the last index update.

# Fixed
- canvas color change stopped working (#77)
- Duplicate "tag-tree" #74
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.1.5

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description: Minor improvement to improve Obsidian 0.15.5 compatibility.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.1.4

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# Fixed:
- Clicking a node changed the active page, but did not move the graph to the new page, had to click twice.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.1.3

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# Fixed
- Restarting of ExcaliBrain after Excalidraw is turned off and on again (typical case is the installation of an Excalidraw update) works as expected again.
- corrected spelling of Ontology
- Corrected error, sometimes ExcaliBrain went blank when clicking a link for no apparent reason (restarting resolved the issue)
- Added Ontology suggester mid-sentence trigger and an option for bold field names. You may add fields mid-way in sentences following one of these two formats:
```markdown
We met at [location:: [[XYZ restaurant]]] with [candidate:: [[John Doe]]]
We met at (location:: [[XYZ restaurant]]) with (candidate:: [[John Doe]])
```
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.1.2

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
⚠⚠⚠ Requires Obsidian 0.15.3 ⚠⚠⚠

# Fixed:
- Cleaned up filter multi-select style
- ExcaliBrain fails when YAML field is part of the ontology and the field contains date/time value (#65)

# New features:
- Added Command Palette Action to open ExcaliBrain in a popout window.
- Added one more field suggester option "Generic suggester" with a default trigger of `:::`.  "Generic Suggester" will display all defined fields in the ontology regardless of them being children, parents, or friends.
- Added two additional fields to Ontology Settings. `Excluded` is a utility list only used in the plugin-settings to calculate the `Unassigned` list. 
  - `Excluded`: You can explicitly list all of the dataview and YAML fields in your vault that will never be used for ExcaliBrain ontology
  - `Unassigned`: This is an automatically generated (not editable) list containing all the dataview and YAML fields from your Vault that do not appear in any of the other lists (i.e. Parents, Children, Friends, and Excluded). The purpose of this field is to help you spot fields you are using but haven't defined in your ontology.  
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/14358394/176841164-5a871a13-a9f1-440e-bd0a-4b154c294aab.png) 
- #64: Added option to display item count next to node gates
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/14358394/176878994-81521b6f-04bf-4f1e-8b4e-474e115d0ed3.png)
- #56: Added option to show full tag name. 
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/14358394/176884913-e9adb156-8c04-4b70-a60d-8c6d8280f14d.png)
This:
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/14358394/176884990-6ab03baf-ec88-4133-9da1-83117a8f8309.png)
vs. this:
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/14358394/176885066-5ae5fba3-6b7d-413f-afa8-b9505cfd37c6.png)
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.1.1

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
Support for Obsidian 0.15.0 Popout windows

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/14358394/175513241-df2d3a2a-955e-461d-919b-a5964e0c2ad1.png)
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.1.0

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
This release fixes compatibility issues with Dataview 0.5.31.
This version will only work with the updated Dataview.
After updating Dataview I had to restart Obsidian for the new Dataview index to take effect.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.22

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New
- #50: Support for `[Markdown](links)` in data view fields
- #47: Extended alias support. You can now author your own javascript function to calculate the note title.
- File search results have a slightly cleaner look because I moved the file path info into hover labels. You can still filter based on full path, but only the filename is displayed.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.21

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New
- Ontology suggester is now sorted alphabetically
- Settings tags and link styles are sorted alphabetically
- I added 3 new command palette actions to add DataView fields as PARENT, CHILD, and FRIEND from the markdown editor.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0..0.20

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New
- I added an ontology suggester. Typing the trigger sequence of "::p", "::c", "::f" (can be customized in settings) will bring up a suggester window listing parent, child, and friend DataView fields based on the ontology you described.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.19

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description: addressing changes requested by @liamcain ([PR #968](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/968))
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.18

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description: The index was still not ok. Hopefully now fixed completely...
releases.name: Excalibrain 0.0.17

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description: Fixed indexing of tags (#46), which got broken in the performance improvement in 0.0.15
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.16

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description: Reduced indexing time by over 50% (down from ~300ms to ~120ms in the case of my desktop with a Vault size of 10000 nodes). Hopefully, this will mean a much lower resource drag on Obsidian when ExcaliBrain is running in the background.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.15

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# Fix
- Minor fix: if the same field is present multiple times in a document, and...
  - in one case the field includes a list of links `field:: [[link 1]], [[link 2]]`,
  - in another case the list includes text or unresolved links e.g. `field:: [[unresolved link]]` or `field:: some text and a [[link 3]]`
  - the same field is also present in the frontmatter `field: [[link 4]]`
Then ExcaliBrain did not pick up all the links.

Regarding dataview fields in frontmatter: please type the field names with lowercase letters and with "-" (dashs) instead of spaces. This is because for some reason Dataview only indexes frontmatter tags case-sensitively, while inline fields case-insensitively.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.14

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New
- I added link labels. You can configure at the link type level to display the DataView field (or fields) for the link.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/14358394/170818167-d3c7c964-9b9e-4786-8028-e5f15683b3b0.png)
- Filter links and nodes based on data view field and tags. Selecting items from the dropdown list will hide those on the graph.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/14358394/170818192-962262a0-9047-49d2-b0d2-ef94cfe9800e.png)
- [#663](https://github.com/zsviczian/obsidian-excalidraw-plugin/issues/633) ExcaliBrain now supports inline DataView fields in uncompressed Excalidraw files as well.
  - Dataview has an unintended special feature supporting inline fields mid-way through a paragraph. This works because the DataView full-line parser for metadata stops when it sees indentation/punctuation. Thus if you start your field name mid-way in a paragraph with a punctuation character, then the field will be picked up from within a paragraph. With this change to ExcaliBrain DataView field support, you can also use these inline fields mid-way through a paragraph. See related discussion on the DataView forum [here](https://github.com/blacksmithgu/obsidian-dataview/discussions/1111)
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/14358394/170096626-85ef0cbb-82ed-41e3-99ad-0ffd78762c1d.png)
  - Excalidraw will also process DataView fields in the YAML frontmatter. Note however that you should include one link per front matter tag.
```markdown
---
my field: [[link]]
---
document body...
```
- History now displays aliases honoring settings. Thanks, @erichalldev for the contribution!  (#43)
- I added a setting under hierarchy settings to treat all inferred links as Friends (instead of parents, children, or friends depending on the location of the link). This way, if you use ExcaliBrain for genealogy you can leave all related information such as place of birth, country, occupation, etc as inferred links and only explicitly define links for the genealogical hierarchy. (#41)
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/14358394/170822159-bc6a4713-1095-43ec-bfb9-4078f5ffa405.png)
- I added a command palette action to open ExcaliBrain in Hover Editor.
- By setting up a hotkey for starting ExcaliBrain (either in a docked work pane or in a Hover Editor) you can use the same hotkey to activate ExcaliBrain search from anywhere in Obsidian. If the ExcaliBrain work pane is not visible or the hover editor is minimized, ExcaliBrain will reveal the work pane and activate the search.

# Fix
- Link direction was reversed. I changed the logic, however, if you are using directional links, you will need to change style settings.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.13

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New
- you can now navigate to virtual thoughts without being prompted to create the file. You can still create the file by navigation by holding down the SHIFT key while clicking on the virtual node.
- search will prefer filename matches over full path matches

# Fix
- ExcaliBrain won't restart properly after updating Excalidraw. (#32) Now Excalibrain will properly unload and wait for Excalidraw to restart.
- Virtual notes didn't show children, parents, and friends properly. (#30). This was due to an error with indexing.
- When the file in the active pane was renamed ExcaliBrain displayed a blank screen
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.12

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New
- You can now search for folders and tags in the top left search box
- Added option to show/hide siblings
- Items starred using the Starred core plugin will be listed when you click the empty search box.

# Fixed
- Zoom to fit will leave a margin for the navigation history to fit.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.11

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New
- Added option to show/hide all page nodes, including defined, inferred, virtual, and attachment pages.   This allows you to browse only the tag or folder hierarchy without files being shown. (#22)
- Pin ExcaliBrain to Leaf (#19)

# Fixed / Improved
- History now includes unique files, not the full navigation history
- Fuzzy search now prioritizes exact matches over fuzzy matches
- Improved the logical definition of "virtual" nodes. Folders and Tags are no longer considered virtual.
- ExcaliBrain will now notice changes to files synchronized in the background. e.g. if you have a page open in ExcaliBrain, and you synchronize a new file that has a link to the currently displayed central node, it will automatically show up on the graph after the synchronization is complete.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.10

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description: Updated CSS. The top section of the graph was unresponsive to clicks which I fixed via CSS.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.9

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# Fixed
- ExcaliBrain failed when navigating to a newly created page
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.8

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
A minor update to [0.0.5](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/releases/tag/0.0.5)  & [0.0.6](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/releases/tag/0.0.6). Please read the release notes for 0.0.5 as there are many changes.

# Fixed
- tag hierarchy is shown correctly as a tree in case of multi-level tags e.g. #books #books/business #books/business/finance
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.7

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
A minor update to [0.0.5](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/releases/tag/0.0.5). Please read the release notes for 0.0.5 as there are many changes.

# New
- Performance improvement
- If you click a "tag" or "folder" history item, show-tags or show-folders will be enabled if they were not
- If for some reason clicking a link does not move it to the center, clicking a second time will
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.6

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New
- When only ExcaliBrain is open, you can open a new workspace leaf by searching for a file in the top-left search bar. If ExcaliBrain is open in a hover editor, the page you search for will be opened in a new leaf in the main workspace.
- Hid the zoom button and the Excalidraw Help button from view (can be overridden via [css](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/blob/master/styles.css)).
- Replaced simple file search with Obsidian Fuzzy search.
- When clicking the "✏" button, if ExcaliBrain is open in a hover editor, the Excalidraw snapshot will be created in the main workspace, not in the Hover editor.
- Added navigation history. You can style it via [css](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/blob/master/styles.css).
- Added folder hierarchy and tag hierarchy.

# Fixed
- Nodes unresponsive at smaller window sizes #9
- Fixed startup error if Excalibrain file already exists (but is not an Excalidraw drawing) [#16](https://github.com/zsviczian/excalibrain/issues/16)
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.5

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description: Improved Mobile Device styling
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.4

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/14358394/167198289-a9c727c2-db4c-4596-9b17-15a35edcbe72.png)
- Filter buttons, to filter attachments, virtual nodes, and inferred nodes without having to open settings.
- Button to toggle the display of page aliases or file names
- Button to export the current snapshot to Excalidraw

# Fixed
- explicit relations were not recognized when DataView field contains a block reference `[[file#section]]`. This now works. (Note that I still do not have support for honoring the section reference when navigating to the link from ExcaliBrain).
- In some cases opening a new ExcaliBrain instance resulted in a startup error due to some race condition between Excalidraw initializing the scene and obsidian registering the view for the workspace leaf.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.3

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
# New
- Link types and directed links
- #11: Exclude file path list. ExcaliBrain will exclude all files from the view that starts with any of the specified folder names

# Fixed
- #3: search box misplaced after full-screen mode
- Reset Excalidraw active tool to "selection" on ExcaliBrain start
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.2

releases.author: zsviczian
releases.description:
Be careful, this is an early beta release! While I do not expect any issues, every new plugin is a risk. Make sure you have a proper backup of your Vault - just in case.

This is the initial beta release of [ExcaliBrain](https://youtu.be/O2s-h5VKCas). A more detailed YouTube video is in the making that will explain how to use this plugin. I will attach it once it is published.
releases.name: ExcaliBrain 0.0.1
